meta.title: Event Aggregation & Approval Automation | Hardip Parmar - Case Study
meta.description: How I built a scalable event aggregation and approval system integrating external paid APIs, AI-powered content transformation, and GeoDirectory-based publishing.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: The Indian Community platform required a scalable system to aggregate events from a paid external API, manage moderation workflows, and publish structured event data efficiently.
challenge.additionalInfo: Manual event handling was inefficient and error-prone. There was no centralized system to filter, approve, or transform incoming event data before publishing, leading to inconsistent content quality and operational delays.

problems.title: No Centralized Moderation
problems.description: Events fetched from external APIs lacked a unified approval workflow before publishing.

problems.title: Content Quality & Scalability
problems.description: Raw API data required manual cleanup, making it difficult to scale daily event publishing.

solution.title: The Architectural Solution
solution.subtitle: Centralized middleware with AI-powered content processing and automated publishing.
solution.description: Designed a modular, extensible system to fetch, moderate, transform, and publish events seamlessly.

features.title: Central Event Middleware
features.description: Built a centralized WordPress-based server that fetches daily events from external paid APIs and organizes them by category.

features.title: Admin Moderation Panel
features.description: Developed a React-based dashboard inside WordPress admin for listing, filtering, approving, and rejecting events.

features.title: AI Content Transformation
features.description: Integrated OpenAI API to automatically rephrase and enhance event content before publishing.

features.title: Auto-Approval Rules
features.description: Implemented category-based automation where selected event categories are auto-approved and published instantly.

features.title: Extensible Integration System
features.description: Designed the plugin architecture to support future third-party integrations without major refactoring.

technicalDeepDive.title: Technical Deep Dive: Event Approval Workflow
technicalDeepDive.description: The system acts as a middleware layer between external event APIs and the Indian Community platform. Events are fetched daily, stored in a central database, and processed through a moderation pipeline. Approved events are enhanced via OpenAI and then pushed into GeoDirectory format for seamless frontend rendering.

codeExample.title: Event Approval & AI Processing Hook
codeExample.description: Automated workflow for event approval and publishing

testimonials.quote: I work closely with Hardip Parmar for my website and find him extremely professional and highly skilled in his work. We continue working with him and consider him one of the best WordPress developers out there. He is also comfortable working across other platforms, and I would strongly recommend him.
testimonials.author: Amit Gupta
testimonials.title: Co-founder, Indian.Community
